data.summary: Dedicated and safety-conscious professional driver with over 10 years of experience operating heavy and light motor vehicles under a valid Code C1 licence. Proven track record of on-time deliveries, zero at-fault accidents, and strict adherence to road safety regulations. Experienced in long-distance and local route driving, vehicle pre-inspection, and basic mechanical fault reporting. Committed to delivering excellent service, maintaining cargo integrity, and upholding all traffic and occupational health and safety legislation.

bullets: Completed 500+ long-distance delivery runs across Gauteng, Limpopo, and Mpumalanga with a 99% on-time delivery rate
Reduced fuel consumption by 12% by adopting eco-driving techniques and optimised route planning
Maintained a zero at-fault accident record over 5 years, earning the company's Annual Safety Driver Award in 2022 and 2023
Conducted daily pre-trip vehicle inspections, identifying and reporting 30+ mechanical faults before they caused operational delays
Transported over 10 000 tonnes of cargo annually while complying with road-weight limits and load-securing regulations
Operated a 5-tonne C1 truck on scheduled municipal and retail supply routes, servicing 20+ clients per week
Decreased route turnaround time by 18% by identifying and proposing 3 alternative delivery corridors
Mentored 2 junior drivers on vehicle handling, defensive driving techniques, and health and safety compliance
Managed warehouse loading, cargo strapping, and delivery documentation for 100+ consignments per month
Delivered parcels and documents across Tshwane metropolitan area, handling 40-60 stops per day
Achieved a 98% customer satisfaction rating based on delivery confirmation feedback forms
Maintained vehicle logbooks and trip sheets in compliance with Road Traffic Act requirements

technical: Vehicle Logbook and Trip Sheet Maintenance

projects.name: Route Optimisation Initiative — Rapid Freight Solutions
projects.description: Led an internal project to remap 15 recurring delivery routes using GPS data analysis, cutting average daily mileage by 8% and saving the company approximately R45 000 in fuel costs annually.
bullets: Analysed 6 months of trip data to identify inefficient routes and peak congestion windows
Proposed 3 alternative corridors adopted company-wide, reducing average trip duration by 22 minutes
Presented findings to operations manager, resulting in formal policy update for route planning
